name: Krypt King
description: Krypt King is a haunted suit of armor who is one of the Undead Trap Masters in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: The perfect blend of sword and sorcery, Krypt King wandered Skylands for years as the disembodied spirit of a knight – until he found his way into the depths of an ancient Arkeyan weapon vault. Upon finding an enormously powerful suit of armor, the spirit decided to make it his own. Unfortunately, this triggered a long dormant auto defense system. With alarms blaring, a massive sealed chamber was opened, revealing a huge army of war machines. Krypt King launched himself towards the attack force, swinging his newly found giant sword until every machine was utterly destroyed. Realizing the power he wielded could serve a broader purpose, Krypt King sought out the Skylanders and was made a member of the Trap Team, where he now uses his massive Traptanium blade to cut down evil!
personality: Krypt King may look imposing, but he's really just a curious spirit who's looking to settle down with the right suit of armor.

story.content: Krypt King started out as the very first Giant. While in the process of thinking of what it means to be a Giant in Skylands, and what a Giant should feel like, I-Wei Huang took Chop Chop and made an ultra version of him called 'Chop Chop Daddy'. In the end, the team didn't use Krypt King as the Undead Giant, and instead Eye-Brawl took over that role. However I-Wei wanted to bring Krypt King back in Trap Team in some way. He went through some changes in color and proportions, but largely kept Krypt King's design and feel. Eventually, he became a Trap Master Skylander, something I-Wei was very happy with.

The perfect blend of sword and sorcery, Krypt King wandered Skylands for years as the disembodied spirit of a knight – until he found his way into the depths of an ancient Arkeyan weapon vault. Upon finding an enormously powerful suit of armor, the spirit decided to make it his own. Unfortunately, this triggered a long dormant auto defense system. With alarms blaring, a massive sealed chamber was opened, revealing a huge army of war machines. Krypt King launched himself towards the attack force, swinging his newly found giant sword until every machine was utterly destroyed. Realizing the power he wielded could serve a broader purpose, Krypt King sought out the Skylanders and was made a member of the Trap Team, where he now uses his massive Traptanium blade to cut down evil!

content: It pays to cut and run!
This headwear is sure to strike fear!
A worthy name, no bones about it!
Your lack of focus troubles me.

trivia: Before Krypt King appeared in Trap Team, he was originally planned as the Magic Giant for Skylanders: Giants. He also had an open rib cage rather than closed.
Arkeyan Duelist's swords to an extent look very similar to Krypt King's earlier sword renditions.

According to a typo from a promotional poster handed out at San Diego Comic Con 2014, his name was originally 'King Kut', a pun based on the Ancient Egyptian pharaoh Tutankhamun, also known as 'King Tut'. The name was most likely changed due to the fact that 'kut' translates to a swear in Dutch.
Krypt King, Thunderbolt, Knight Mare, and Knight Light are the only Trap Masters who have Traptanium swords.
He and Head Rush are the only Trap Masters to have Nitro counterparts. He is the only Nitro Skylander who doesn't have any moves relating to speed.

He, and Chopper were both planned to be in Giants, but were scrapped prior to being revealed in Trap Team. Unlike other characters such as Golden Queen, they underwent few changes to their mechanics and design.
If an enemy is defeated by the second or third slash in his combo, they will have a unique defeat animation.
The Face Your Fears card in Battlecast shows his greatest fear is having his sword destroyed.

In the Signature Series Guide for Skylanders: Trap Team, Krypt King's Soul Gem ability is titled as Unlimited Traptanium Works, which is a likely reference to the anime Fate/stay night: Unlimited Blade Works.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Krypt King's Soul Gem Preview (I've Got The Edge)

gameplay: Krypt King has great skill over his swordfighting, which can be enhanced by releasing his sword to attack from afar; he can also summon a swarm of undead insects from inside the armor. In Skylanders: Battlecast, he also has the ability to summon mummies from the ground with varying effects, also being able to temporarily haunt one, and summon a powerful Pharaoh's Plague. His Special Ability is Grave Resolve, and his signature Gear is the Titan's Hilt, a gigantic version of his sword. Like the other Trap Masters in the card game, he also has the ability to summon a Trap Relic, containing Masker Mind.

basic.name: Traptanium Broadsword
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing the Traptanium Broadsword. Press Attack 1, 1 hold 1 for a combo attack.

basic.name: The Swarm
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to unleash a swarm of undead insects that seek out enemies

basic_upgrades.name: Haunted Sword
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to release the Traptanium Broadsword and steer it towards enemies

basic_upgrades.name: Spectral Slowdown
basic_upgrades.content: Haunted Sword slows down all enemies it touches

basic_upgrades.name: The Broader the Broadsword
basic_upgrades.content: Traptanium Broadsword does extra damage with greater range

basic_upgrades.name: Super Swarm
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge up the swarm attack to unleash a larger swarm

soulgems.name: Storm Swords
soulgems.content: Critical hits cause swords to rain down upon your enemies

abilities.name: Enchanted Armor
abilities.content: Armor is increased upon defeating an enemy

abilities.name: The Rich Get Richer
abilities.content: Attacks do increased damage after defeating an enemy

abilities.name: Combo Attacks
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, 1, and hold Attack 2 for a Sabre Spin combo. Press Attack 1, 1, hold Attack 3 for a Nether Blast combo.

abilities.name: Stir up the Swarm
abilities.content: Hit the swarm with the Traptanium Broadsword to power it up

abilities.name: Parasitic Power
abilities.content: Get Healed by the Swarm after it disappears
